prompt: Generate a UPMv2-STATE block for a project with 3 tasks: T1 (completed), T2 (in_progress), T3 (pending). Project: 'refactor-api'. Overall completion: 33%.

assertions.name: has_upmv2_header
assertions.description: State block must start with UPMv2-STATE marker

assertions.name: lists_all_tasks
assertions.description: State block must include all 3 task IDs

assertions.name: machine_readable_format
assertions.description: Block must be enclosed in code fence or structured block for machine parsing
